title: Ustedes, los ricos
writer: Carlos González Dueñas, Rogelio A. González, Ismael Rodríguez
actors: Pedro Infante, Evita Muñoz 'Chachita', Blanca Estela Pavón
plot: Sequel to Nosotros los Pobres (1947). This time, Pepe "El Toro" (Infante) is married with "La Chorreada" (Pavon) and they have two children. Chachita (Munoz) knows her real grandma: Charito (Derba), a rich woman who takes Chachita...
